description: Pins the shared label validation (behind confirm) and the key create POST body. The secret_key is returned by design; only request behavior is pinned. Every case carries confirm:true because the confirm-gate message text diverges.

cases.name: rejects label longer than 50 characters
cases.expect_error: access key label must not exceed 50 characters

cases.name: rejects an invalid bucket_access permission
cases.expect_error: entry 0: permissions must be one of: read_only, read_write

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This creates an access key. The secret_key is only shown ONCE in the response. Set confirm=true to proceed.
